mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_common_user.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
SELECT seq_shelter_user.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ddd_user ( user_number, user_type, user_id, user_password, user_name, user_nickname, user_gender, user_birth, user_phone, user_email ) VALUES ( #{userNumber}, #{userType}, #{userId}, #{userPassword}, #{userName}, #{userNickname}, #{userGender}, #{userBirth}, #{userPhone}, #{userEmail} )
INSERT INTO ddd_user_shelter (user_number, shelter_name, shelter_business_number, shelter_address) VALUES (#{userNumber}, #{shelterName}, #{shelterBusinessNumber}, #{shelterAddress})
mapper.select: SELECT user_number, user_nickname, user_type FROM ddd_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_password = #{userPassword} AND user_type = #{userType} AND user_status= 'kind'
select count(user_number) from ddd_user where user_nickname = #{userNickname}
select count(user_number) from ddd_user where user_email = #{userEmail}
SELECT user_id, user_name, user_birth, user_nickname, user_email, user_phone, user_gender FROM ddd_user WHERE user_number = #{userNumber}
mapper.update: UPDATE ddd_user SET user_status = 'withdraw' WHERE user_number = #{userNumber}
